<!-- GENERATED by cmd/gendocs from internal/inspect/registry.go. Do not edit by hand; run `make docs-gen`. -->

Markdown inspectors report body conventions: headings, sections, and code fences.

Inspectors in this family:

- [Heading Shape]({{< relref "heading-shape.md" >}}) — Report single-H1, H1-matches-title, and heading-level-jump rates.
- [Sections]({{< relref "sections.md" >}}) — Report recurring section headings and how many files contain each.
- [Code Fences]({{< relref "code-fences.md" >}}) — Report how many fenced code blocks open and how many carry a language tag.
